title: Target POS Malware Breach
storyIntro: You are a security analyst for a massive retail chain. Attackers compromised an HVAC vendor's credentials to gain access to the corporate network, then moved laterally to the Point of Sale (POS) systems, installing memory-scraping malware.
brief: A point-of-sale terminal network compromise has leaked customer transaction data. Intruders are actively routing scraped track-2 credentials to external command servers.
initialLogs: [CRITICAL] BlackPOS malware signature detected in memory. Memory scraper payload: 
[ERROR] Unauthorized FTP transfer to external IP

agents.name: Manager
agents.message: Are credit card numbers being scraped? PCI compliance is on the line.

agents.name: Teammate
agents.message: I see memory scraping happening on registers in 500 stores.

possibleActions: Deploy EDR rules to block BlackPOS
winCondition: Malware contained and vendor access revoked.
